attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	TMP.TRANSACTION_ID, TMP.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT, TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		TMP.CREATION_DATE,
		TMP.CREATED_BY,
		TMP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		TMP.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
		TMP.ORGANIZATION_ID,
		TMP.TRANSACTION_DATE,
		TMP.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID,
		TMP.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,
		TMP.TRANSACTION_VALUE,
		TMP.PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
		TMP.GL_BATCH_ID,
		TMP.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE,
		TMP.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE,
		TMP.CONTRA_SET_ID,
		TMP.RATE_OR_AMOUNT,
		TMP.BASIS_TYPE,
		TMP.RESOURCE_ID,
		TMP.COST_ELEMENT_ID,
		TMP.ACTIVITY_ID,
		TMP.CURRENCY_CODE,
		TMP.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
		TMP.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE,
		TMP.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
		TMP.REQUEST_ID,
		TMP.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
		TMP.PROGRAM_ID,
		TMP.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
		TMP.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,
		TMP.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID,
		TMP.GL_SL_LINK_ID,
		TMP.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
		TMP.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,
        TMP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
		TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
		TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME,
		'CG1'
FROM
(
	SELECT	 TRANSACTION_ID, REFERENCE_ACCOUNT, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY,
			CREATION_DATE,
			CREATED_BY,
			LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
			INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
			ORGANIZATION_ID,
			TRANSACTION_DATE,
			TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID,
			TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID,
			TRANSACTION_VALUE,
			PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
			GL_BATCH_ID,
			ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE,
			BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE,
			CONTRA_SET_ID,
			RATE_OR_AMOUNT,
			BASIS_TYPE,
			RESOURCE_ID,
			COST_ELEMENT_ID,
			ACTIVITY_ID,
			CURRENCY_CODE,
			CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE,
			CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE,
			CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
			REQUEST_ID,
			PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
			PROGRAM_ID,
			PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
			ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,
			REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID,
			GL_SL_LINK_ID,
			USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
			INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,
	 SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME 
	 FROM	
	 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACCOUNTS
	  WHERE	 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
		AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate'
		AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE<>'DELETE') TMP
QUALIFY	RANK () OVER (
PARTITION BY TMP.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID 
ORDER BY TMP.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,
		TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
